loop1.note: Showing PCC Panel 2 aggregate readings; 3 of 22 members (Axial Fan Panel-1, Frisking+Security, Axial Fan Panel-2) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing live power distribution across all LT-PCC feeders. Load % (loadPct) is honest-blanked because this panel's nameplate rated_kva is unknown, making percentage calculation impossible. Some feeders (Axial Fan Panel-1, Axial Fan Panel-2, Frisking+Security) are dark (no live data) and will render as blank rows.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power — contracted supply capacity is unknown for this asset, so headroom/denominator is blank.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate consumption trend and stats from 19 active feeders; 3 feeders (Axial Fan Panel-1, Frisking+Security, Axial Fan Panel-2) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing per-phase voltage, current unbalance, and total current for the 21 outgoing feeders; 3 members (Axial Fan Panel-1, Frisking+Security, Axial Fan Panel-2) are dark and honest-blanked.
